name: Beaconing C2 Traffic (NDR)
description: Detects regular interval connections to external IPs indicating C2 beaconing - NDR sensor detection
query:
// C2 Beaconing Detection (NDR)
// Regular interval connections detected by NDR sensor
events from ndr_flow
where alert_type = "c2_beacon"
  or (direction = "outbound" and not destination_ip starts_with "10." and not destination_ip starts_with "192.168." and not destination_ip starts_with "172." and beacon_score > 0.8)
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 50
within 3600 seconds
